[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000001001 2
1 0110100100 4
2 0110000101 4
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0001100100 3
6 0100000101 3
7 1000100110 4
